texto: One of the greatest tools you cannot do without is the media. These various means for mass communication and those involved in them must be your partners and not your enemies
autor: you must not be afraid of them but befriend and love them. If you are going to be significant and relevant then you are going to need someone to help broadcast your voice and channel your substance to the world.
